title: Sour Canadian Tomato Stir-fry
description: A light and sweet Jain-friendly dish perfect for a sick-day treat featuring fresh tomatoes in a tangy sauce.
instructions: Chop the tomatoes, onions, garlic, and ginger into small pieces.
In a wok or large frying pan, heat the sesame oil over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onions, minced garlic, and grated ginger to the pan. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Push the vegetables to one side of the pan and add tomatoes to another part of the pan. Let them cook down a bit.
Pour in the soy sauce, vinegar, and red pepper flakes over the tomatoes. Add salt according to taste.
Stir everything together well, then let it simmer for about 5 minutes until most of the liquid is absorbed and the vegetables are tender but still slightly crisp.
Serve hot with a sprinkle of cilantro if desired.
